'''vobawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:waffly|waffly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waffly|waffly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vobawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobawithi|vobawithi]] || [[word:vobawiji|vobawiji]] || [[word:vobawishi|vobawishi]] || [[word:vobawiki|vobawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobawuthuthu|vobawuthuthu]] || [[word:vobawujuju|vobawujuju]] || [[word:vobawushushu|vobawushushu]] || [[word:vobawukuku|vobawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobawuthu|vobawuthu]] || [[word:vobawuju|vobawuju]] || [[word:vobawushu|vobawushu]] || [[word:vobawuku|vobawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobawufthuf|vobawufthuf]] || [[word:vobawufjuf|vobawufjuf]] || [[word:vobawufshuf|vobawufshuf]] || [[word:vobawufkuf|vobawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobawethe|vobawethe]] || [[word:vobaweje|vobaweje]] || [[word:vobaweshe|vobaweshe]] || [[word:vobaweke|vobaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobawothotho|vobawothotho]] || [[word:vobawojojo|vobawojojo]] || [[word:vobawoshosho|vobawoshosho]] || [[word:vobawokoko|vobawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobawotho|vobawotho]] || [[word:vobawojo|vobawojo]] || [[word:vobawosho|vobawosho]] || [[word:vobawoko|vobawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobawofthof|vobawofthof]] || [[word:vobawofjof|vobawofjof]] || [[word:vobawofshof|vobawofshof]] || [[word:vobawofkof|vobawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfthÃŸf|vobawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfjÃŸf|vobawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfshÃŸf|vobawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfkÃŸf|vobawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vobawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vobawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vobawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vobawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfthÃŸf|vobawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfjÃŸf|vobawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfshÃŸf|vobawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfkÃŸf|vobawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfthÃŸf|vobawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfjÃŸf|vobawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfshÃŸf|vobawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vobawÃŸfkÃŸf|vobawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobawÃḊthÃḊ|vobawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vobawÃḊjÃḊ|vobawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vobawÃḊshÃḊ|vobawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vobawÃḊkÃḊ|vobawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobawathatha|vobawathatha]] || [[word:vobawajaja|vobawajaja]] || [[word:vobawashasha|vobawashasha]] || [[word:vobawakaka|vobawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobawatha|vobawatha]] || [[word:vobawaja|vobawaja]] || [[word:vobawasha|vobawasha]] || [[word:vobawaka|vobawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobawafthaf|vobawafthaf]] || [[word:vobawafjaf|vobawafjaf]] || [[word:vobawafshaf|vobawafshaf]] || [[word:vobawafkaf|vobawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vobawasha|vobawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vobawshÃḋsha|vobawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vobawrosha|vobawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vobawmusha|vobawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vobawyasha|vobawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govobawnkshÃḋsha|govobawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govobawnkrosha|govobawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govobawnkmusha|govobawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govobawnkyasha|govobawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vobabawasha|vobabawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vobabawshÃḋsha|vobabawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vobabawrosha|vobabawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vobabawmusha|vobabawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vobabawyasha|vobabawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govobabawnkshÃḋsha|govobabawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govobabawnkrosha|govobabawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govobabawnkmusha|govobabawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govobabawnkyasha|govobabawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vebÃḊwasha|vebÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vebÃḊwshÃḋsha|vebÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vebÃḊwrosha|vebÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vebÃḊwmusha|vebÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vebÃḊwyasha|vebÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govebÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|govebÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govebÃḊwnkrosha|govebÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govebÃḊwnkmusha|govebÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govebÃḊwnkyasha|govebÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vobfawasha|vobfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vobfawshÃḋsha|vobfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vobfawrosha|vobfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vobfawmusha|vobfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vobfawyasha|vobfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govobfawnkshÃḋsha|govobfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govobfawnkrosha|govobfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govobfawnkmusha|govobfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govobfawnkyasha|govobfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
